questions: What is the patient's exact age in years?
Are there any known allergies to antibiotics? (Yes/No)
Which antibiotic regimen is chosen? (Amoxicillin/Clavulanic Acid or Cefotaxime or Other)
If Cefotaxime is chosen, is the patient an adult? (Yes/No)
Is the patient unresponsive to antibacterials? (Yes/No)
Does the patient have a decrease in vision? (Yes/No)
Does the patient have an orbital or subperiosteal abscess? (Yes/No)
